reference: I have sharp pain that shoots from the bottoms of my feet up into my legs. I rate the pain at about eight, with ten being the worst. I also have to stretch my legs and feet out very hard and as far as I can all the time because they, I guess you can say, cramp up. It doesn't really hurt; it just irritates and is uncomfortable. I can't sleep. Can you help?
text: I have sharp pain that shoots from the bottoms of my feet up into my legs. I rate the pain at about eight, with ten being the worst. I also have to stretch my legs and feet out hard and as far as I can all the time because they—I guess you can say—cramp up. It doesn't really hurt; it just irritates and is uncomfortable. I can't sleep. Can you help?
